title: Greenpill Garden — Season One
summary: Public Garden sources introducing seasonal stewardship, onboarding, February 2026 workshops, and the approved 2026 Garden model preview.
description: The Garden public thread connects stewardship, 8 Forms of Capital framing, impact reporting, tools, IRL events, website implications, and later workshop progress. The approved Paragraph preview adds the five-month Garden incubation model, Theory of Change, strategy, CIDS, tooling, and harvest context. Treat internal Garden Guide material as review-only until approved.
